name: Nomnomia
short_description: Consume enemies to steal their abilities and survive by managing your HP. Fight for survival on the mysterious planet Nomnomia in this food-chain action shooter.

name: Dracs After Dusk
short_description: Dracs After Dusk is an arcade, top-down shooter. Blast through bloodsuckers as the sharp shootin’ sheriff of a wild west town. Battle the deadliest bosses, claim weapons from the Armory to fuel your leaderboard topping run. It's an old school quarter muncher but luckily you have unlimited credits!
reasons: 現在プレイヤー1人以上 +2

name: Phantom Veil
short_description: A story-driven psychological horror where you play as an investigative reporter drawn into a disturbing and dangerous case. Explore haunting, atmospheric environments, uncover hidden clues, solve intricate environmental puzzles, and confront the terrifying truth that was never meant to be revealed.

name: Dual Core Sync
short_description: Your brain has two sides, and one of them has to break: a high-difficulty, brain-splitting game that forces single players to handle "two-player co-op" solo.

name: Dungeon Bomber
short_description: Dungeon Bomber is a chain-reaction roguelite where you place bombs and blow through the dungeon. Drop a bomb each turn, earn coins, and upgrade your deck. Fuse bombs to boost range and effects. Defeat advancing monsters and destroy the required blocks before your HP runs out.
reasons: 成長/積み上げ要素: Roguelite +10
現在プレイヤー1人以上 +2

name: The Message from Deep Space
short_description: Mission: Translate an interstellar message, using the universal languages of math & science.
reasons: 現在プレイヤー100人以上 +8

name: REWIND
short_description: 《REWIND》 is a hardcore text-based detective puzzle game containing nearly a hundred clues. Players need to carefully examine and deduce the clues to find the answer to the case.
reasons: 現在プレイヤー10人以上 +5

name: Desktop Driller
short_description: An idle game that runs while you work. Your activity powers the drill: dig, earn, upgrade and go deeper. Build your system, automate everything and reach the center of the Earth.
reasons: 現在プレイヤー10人以上 +5

name: Oblivion Maiden
short_description: An exploration adventure set in St. Dorothia Academy, a magical educational institution hidden deep within a forest. A story that begins with an encounter with a girl named Lulunya, and unfolds through mysterious phenomena and dream worlds.
reasons: 現在プレイヤー1人以上 +2

name: Professional Cats
short_description: Professional Cats is a cozy collection of 4 mini-games where cats dressed in different professions challenge your observation and memory skills. Find, match, and organize them while competing on global leaderboards!
reasons: 現在プレイヤー1人以上 +2

name: Horn of the Warlord
short_description: Lead a Viking clan to glory in this accessible turn-based conquest strategy game. Expand your kingdom, raise armies, besiege castles and outsmart a challenging AI across handcrafted worlds built for endless replayability.
reasons: 現在プレイヤー1人以上 +2

name: Rogue Whiskers
short_description: 1–4 player cat roguelite. Scratch, pounce, and blast through 10 snack-filled floors with fish-based weapons, cat toys, and other buffing items as you fight for treats and glory.
reasons: 成長/積み上げ要素: Roguelite +10

name: Quacky
short_description: Meet your digital duck: feed it, play with it and watch it age. Earn drops with time, trade them on the marketplace, and endlessly optimize your device for maximum quack efficiency.
reasons: 現在プレイヤー1人以上 +2

name: Agricola - The King's Farmer
short_description: Agricola - The King's Farmer: A classic, challenging economic simulation game. Manage your own farm - cultivate your fields, raise cows, train horses, and manage your forest. The goal of the game is to become king. Will you succeed?
reasons: 現在プレイヤー1人以上 +2

name: C.L.A.S.H: Colonial Life Advancing Self-sustained Hemisphere - Chapter 1
short_description: C.L.A.S.H: Colonial Life Advancing Self-sustained Hemisphere - Chapter 1 is an action/adventure title with platformer elements. Parkour your way through 25 unique buildings to collect hidden individual objectives/powerups. While you're at it, avoid toxic blobs that will radiate you into nothingness.
reasons: 現在プレイヤー1人以上 +2

name: The Serpent & The Seed
short_description: A poetic narrative adventure retelling the greatest story in history - from the Garden of Eden to the end of the world - through stunning hand-drawn art, atmospheric puzzles, and a haunting original soundtrack.
reasons: 現在プレイヤー1人以上 +2

name: At Run Time
short_description: At Run Time is a first-person parkour game focused on speed, precision, and risk-taking. After stealing an energy source from a smuggler’s hideout, escape through deadly traps using advanced movement skills before time runs out.

name: Reverse Survivors
short_description: A reversed survivors-like where you are sending waves of monster to stop the survivors.
reasons: 現在プレイヤー1人以上 +2

name: Toy's Dream
short_description: Toy’s Dream is a cute and wholesome puzzle-platformer. You are a Hero, who sets out on a journey to save the town that has been attacked by the Demon Lord. He must overcome many obstacles along the way, using glue and thread...

name: KimuNote
short_description: Everything you need to organize your projects and your life in one place.
reasons: 現在プレイヤー1人以上 +2

name: Haunt Out
short_description: A voodoo ritual has gone wrong… Trapped in a haunted Louisiana mansion, play as both a voodoo priest and a mischievous spirit. Use powerful magic to hunt or escape, set traps, and wreak havoc in a tense, strategic VR duel

name: SU8WAY
short_description: You are Henry, a man who only wanted to take Train 8 to work. But you quickly realize that something is wrong. Everything seems to repeat itself  like a loop. Objects and people begin to change, and nothing is quite the way it should be.
reasons: 現在プレイヤー1人以上 +2

name: Cultivation: Mystic Realm of Spirit Mountain
short_description: You'll explore uncharted spirit mountains teeming with spirit plants, stones, treasures, and beasts. Gather resources, grow plants, refine pills to advance, with spirit roots, skills, and pets aiding your relaxed cultivation. Begin your journey!

name: Escape the Red Curse
short_description: A group of mediums is trapped in a cursed apartment. Explore the environment, find your comrades, and solve logic puzzles. Lift the curse, and escape before it’s too late.

name: Reverse Parking Simulator - Android extension pack
short_description: Come try out the Android version! For now, it doesn't include custom levels and doesn't support cloud saves or achievements.

name: Gaslamp Cases 7: The Faith of Rasputin
short_description: Can you help Morgan solve the case of a mysterious drug, spreading throughout the city of London? Solve exciting match-3 puzzles, collect important clues, and uncover the truth in this gripping adventure!

name: A Simple Square
short_description: A Simple Square is a minimalist puzzle game where every move changes the level. Slide in straight lines, erase the tiles behind you, plan your path, and reach the exit without trapping yourself.

name: Cell Conquest
short_description: Cell Conquest is a turn-based logic strategy game where you place walls, complete cells, and outthink your opponents. Play solo against the computer or compete locally with 2–5 players across multiple maps and board sizes.

name: Mono
short_description: 『Mono』 is a 2D action game set in a monochrome world. Explore the land to enhance your abilities, defeat the formidable foes standing in your way, and resolve the crisis befalling this black-and-white realm.

name: DIGDLE
short_description: A 3D nonogram puzzler with 300+ puzzles across unlockable packs. Chisel dirt, hammer rock (3 hits), and shatter chain-linked amber to uncover buried objects. Race for stars, solve clean for Perfect badges, or use a hint — it leaves its own badge behind.
